visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young boy with glasses and oversized headphones sits at a wooden table, singing passionately into a professional microphone. An orange and blue head sculpture sits before him. The room is dimly lit with a soft yellow lamp in the background. (2) A woman in a light green and pink sweatshirt stands in a brightly lit indoor space with a wooden cabinet and flowers behind her. She smiles and gestures while looking directly into the camera lens. (3) Transition to a rehearsal scene where a man in a denim jacket coaches two young boys on the floor of a domestic room. The boys are dressed in casual long-sleeved shirts and jeans. (4) The scene shifts back to a studio setup with a young girl and boy wearing headphones and speaking into mics. The girl has short bangs and a playful expression. Blue curtains and studio equipment are visible. (5) A close-up shows the woman from earlier laughing uncontrollably, covering her face. She is in a room with white cabinets and collectible toys in the background. (6) A wide shot displays the three children sitting at a recording desk in the studio, waving to the camera as the session concludes. The lighting is bright and even.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: 2025 曠世巨作準備誕生. (2) [Slogan]: HAHA 主題曲 金邀請... (3) [Slogan]: 蔡氏三巨頭. (4) [Slogan]: 錄音過程大公開. (5) [Variety]: (認真波). [Variety]: 課前訓練中... (6) [Variety]: (真小孩). (7) [Slogan]: 正式錄音 乖學生 v.s. 調皮學生. (8) [Variety]: (誰定這標題的可以喔). (9) [Variety]: 貢哥認真點. (10) [Slogan]: 可愛倒數5秒. [Subtitle]: 師: 佇佗位呀?. (11) [Slogan]: 可愛倒數3秒. [Variety]: 😍😍😍. (12) [Variety]: (???). [Variety]: 親媽無誤!!!. (13) [Subtitle]: 師: 大家找不到他 換你們!. (14) [Variety]: 大家. [Variety]: 找不到. [Variety]: 他. (15) [Variety]: 找不到就找不到啊!. (16) [Variety]: (???). [Variety]: 辛苦老師了😅. (17) [Slogan]: 一起期待完整版吧!!

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 3 children (2 boys, 1 girl), and 1 adult male coach partially visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman in her 30s with long dark hair wearing a casual green and pink sweatshirt; three young children in studio attire including sweaters and headphones.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional recording studio with blue curtains, mics, and cameras; a domestic living room with wooden furniture, white wardrobes, and collectible toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy rhythmic pop BGM starts with a child's bright, high-pitched vocal singing melodic 'Haha' phrases. The tempo is brisk and the beat is punchy. (2) An adult female voice enters with a warm, professional tone, introducing the project over the BGM. Vocal clarity is high. (3) The audio track becomes fragmented as a male voice is heard coaching the children. Several percussive thuds and clothing rustles are audible during the physical movement of the rehearsal. (4) Multiple children's voices join in a synchronized chorus in the studio. Occasional sharp pops and digital SFX underscore text transitions on screen. (5) Loud, melodic laughter from the female speaker dominates the track for a few seconds, accompanied by playful background chatter from a male voice. (6) The session ends with a group cheer of 'Thank you' and 'Hard work,' maintaining a high arousal level as the upbeat music fades out cleanly.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a behind-the-scenes look at the recording process for the 'Haha Baby' theme song, showcasing the charming and humorous interactions between the children and their coaches to build anticipation for the final release.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly mentions 'Haha Baby' theme song and displays brand-related characters and logos.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes a high density of variety-show style text overlays and sound effects to create a highly engaging, social-media-native aesthetic. The high spectral brightness of the audio matches the vibrant visual color tone.
